scripts._build:docker: bash -c 'docker exec $(docker ps --filter "name=vite-dev" --format "{{.Names}}") npm run build'
scripts.export-build: npm run _build:docker && (if [ "$OS" = 'Windows_NT' ]; then npm run _export:prepare-dir:win; else npm run _export:prepare-dir:unix; fi) && npm run _export:copy-files && (if [ "$OS" = 'Windows_NT' ]; then npm run _export:open-explorer:win; else npm run _export:open-explorer:unix; fi)
